raw.title: Sea Beet, Sugar Beet
raw.excerpt:
The summer the visitors flock from the cities to the sandy lands: the children run...

The post Sea Beet, Sugar Beet appeared first on Dark Mountain.

llm_processed.summary: An exploration of the intersection of agriculture and fantasy in the context of ecological restoration.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This enables a bridge between agricultural practice and speculative thought by exploring how fantasy can be used to reimagine sustainable relationships between humans and the earth.
